title: FE-15 - Implementation Map For Current Codebase
description: Map truc tiep FE-15 vao codebase Modular Monolith hien tai. Muc tieu la them durable review workflow cho LLM suggestions ma van reuse toi da FE-06 suggestion pipeline va khong pha boundary giua TestGeneration va LlmAssistant.

techStack.architecture: Modular Monolith (CQRS via Dispatcher, IRepository<T,Guid>, schema isolation, cross-module services, optimistic concurrency by RowVersion)

missingForFe15: Durable entity/table cho tung LLM suggestion dang cho review
Review command handler voi transactional materialization
Shared materializer/factory de dung chung cho FE-06 va FE-15

usageForFe15: Raw suggestion cache + interaction audit da co san thong qua FE-06 pipeline
Khong can them durable review entity vao LlmAssistant
Check/increment LLM usage cho generate preview
Check/increment test case usage cho approve/modify

moduleStructure.description: Khong tao module moi. FE-15 duoc dat trong `ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration` de gan voi test suite lifecycle va tranh write cross-module tu LlmAssistant vao test-case persistence.

addedFiles.description: Durable suggestion row cho review workflow.
Map table `LlmSuggestions`, jsonb columns, indexes, concurrency fields.
Generate preview, list, get detail, review single suggestion.
CQRS command tao durable pending suggestions cho suite.
Get preview detail cho mot suggestion.
API response model cho suggestion preview/detail.
Summary result model cho generate preview endpoint.
API request model cho preview generation.
Concrete shared mapper tu suggestion payload sang `TestCase` graph.

modifiedFiles.change: Refactor de reuse `ILlmSuggestionMaterializer` cho FE-06 LLM suggestion materialization.
Optional: add a `ForceRefresh` or similar option neu can bypass raw cache explicitly.
Optional: honor cache bypass flag while keeping default behavior unchanged.

unchangedFiles: ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant/ - no new controller or durable review entity required for FE-15 v1.
docker-compose.yml - no runtime dependency change expected.
ClassifiedAds.WebAPI/Dockerfile - no new project reference expected.

notes: `LlmSuggestion` nen co jsonb columns cho request/expectation/variables/tags/modifiedContent de giam schema churn.
Index toi thieu can co cho `(TestSuiteId, ReviewStatus)`, `EndpointId`, `CacheKey`, va `AppliedTestCaseId`.
Khong dung `LlmSuggestionCache` lam review table vi cache row co ttl va co the gom nhieu suggestions trong mot blob JSON.

mandatory: List query phai filter theo `TestSuiteId` truoc, roi moi apply `ReviewStatus`, `TestType`, `EndpointId`.
Khong duoc goi LLM khi GET list/get detail/review.
Generate preview phai reuse raw cache behavior cua `ILlmScenarioSuggester` thay vi tu build mot cache layer moi.
forbidden: Duplicate logic map request/expectation/variables o ca FE-06 va FE-15.
Sua behavior FE-06 direct-generation de auto-route qua FE-15 ma khong co ly do product ro rang.

flows.name: Generate Preview
steps: 2. Handler validate suite ownership + approved order + LLM usage limit.
4. Handler supersede pending rows cu va insert pending `LlmSuggestion` rows moi.

flows.name: Review Suggestion
steps: 2. Handler load suite + suggestion + validate rowVersion.
4. Approve/Modify -> materialize `TestCase` graph qua shared materializer.
5. Persist transaction: test case graph + change log + suite version + suggestion state.

qualityGates: Co migration moi cho `LlmSuggestion` va migration freshness verify pass.
Khong pha behavior FE-06 hien co.
Khong tao write dependency truc tiep tu LlmAssistant vao TestGeneration tables.
Khong mo them Docker wiring vi khong co host/module reference moi; nhung phai xac nhan dieu nay trong final report khi implement.

unitTests: GenerateLlmSuggestionPreviewCommandHandlerTests (ownership, archived suite, gate fail, cache hit path, persistence of pending rows).
ReviewLlmSuggestionCommandHandlerTests (approve, reject, modify, concurrency conflict, idempotent approve).
LlmSuggestionMaterializerTests (raw payload -> TestCase graph, modified payload overrides, tags/priority/testType mapping).
BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGeneratorTests (ensure FE-06 still works after shared materializer refactor).
integrationTests: Optional thin controller tests cho route + permission attributes neu repo dang co pattern nay.
Optional migration snapshot verification test if team keeps snapshot assertions.

knownTradeoffs: FE-15 v1 dung 1 durable `LlmSuggestion` entity thay vi them batch/proposal aggregate rieng. Grouping history duoc giai quyet bang `CacheKey` va `Superseded` rows.
Generate preview co the van check LLM usage limit ngay ca khi raw suggestion cache hit, neu muon giu pattern don gian giong FE-06.
Rule-based path/body mutations van nam ngoai FE-15 review flow de tranh mo rong scope khong can thiet.
